features: The ideal conversion plug The UK 2 to 3 pin adaptor electric plug will allow you to use all UK technology. The shaving plug adaptor is a two-pin to three-pin adapter plug uk. The shaver charger and plug for toothbrush charger are ideal for less power-intensive devices.

Travel Essential If you travel frequently, a two-prong plug is a must-have. Buy a plug converter 2 pin to 3 pin ahead of time to save time and money on buying a two pin plug adapter plug uk. The plug adaptor 2 pin to 3 pin is not only useful when travelling, but it can also be used at home.

ONLY 1A FUSE This UK plug adaptor will NOT power any standard EU 2pin devices, Such as Computers or Kettles as it only has 1A fuse. So, this toothbrush adaptor is ideal for small electrical devices such as Shavers, Razors, Toothbrushes, Epilator and other products that requires a 1A Power
This UK converter is only suitable for small appliances, not large appliances.
